blended.narrative: Gunstock Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
